name: Parmesan Duchess Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine water, margarine (or butter), and pepper. Bring to a rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat; stir in potato flakes, mayonnaise, grated Parmesan cheese, and slightly beaten egg until well blended.
5. Pipe or spoon the potato mixture into 16 mounds on the greased pan. Sprinkle lightly with paprika.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
7. Tip: The dish can be prepared up to this point, covered, and refrigerated for up to 24 hours. When ready to bake, uncover and bake for an additional 20 to 25 minutes.
